query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as remaining_old FROM news_articles WHERE url LIKE 'https://news.google.com/rss/articles/%';
SELECT COUNT(*) as new_format FROM news_articles WHERE url LIKE 'https://news.google.com/articles/%';
